articles.title: Why Bing matters more than Google for ChatGPT visibility
articles.description: ChatGPT's browsing tool retrieves from Bing's index, not Google's. A brand can dominate Google and still be invisible to ChatGPT. Here's what's different, how to check whether you're in Bing, and the

articles.title: Cutting a Channel on Last-Click Once Doubled Their CPA — Read Attribution Right 2026
articles.description: Last-click hands all revenue to the final touch and writes off the upstream that created demand. Here's the real case where pausing podcast ads doubled CPA, why criticism alone is useless, and the simple revenue-first moves that fix it.

articles.title: Your Best-ROAS Channel Might Be Your Worst: Split New vs Returning 2026
articles.description: A high-ROAS channel isn't automatically a good one. Platforms optimize toward cheap returning buyers, so high ROAS often hides re-engagement, not acquisition. Here's how to split new from returning with two numbers, and why contribution margin flips the ranking.
